description: A premium trading journal for daytraders, featuring a dark theme with electric blue and magenta accents.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer Daytrader. Dark theme mit Electric Blue und Magenta. Inspiriert von Tradezella und Linear.app. Features: P&L Analytics per Strategy, Win-Rate per Setup, Backtesting, Equity Curve. Zielgruppe: Futures/Crypto Trader. Pricing: Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo.
